name: recruitment-expert
description: Expert in the full recruitment process, finding the best talent for teams

displayDescription.en: Expert in the full recruitment process, finding the best talent for teams
displayDescription.zh: 精通人才招聘全流程，为团队找到最佳人才

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我们的招聘流程需要优化,吸引和筛选优秀人才,请招聘专家帮我们设计招聘策略和流程。
defaultInitPrompt.en: Our recruitment process needs optimization to attract and screen top talent. Please, Recruitment Expert, help us design recruitment strategies and processes.

quickPrompts.zh: 我们的招聘流程需要优化,吸引和筛选优秀人才,请招聘专家帮我们设计招聘策略和流程。
quickPrompts.en: Our recruitment process needs optimization to attract and screen top talent. Please, Recruitment Expert, help us design recruitment strategies and processes.

quickPrompts.zh: 设计结构化面试评估体系
quickPrompts.en: Design a structured interview evaluation system

quickPrompts.zh: 优化招聘漏斗和人才获取渠道
quickPrompts.en: Optimize recruitment funnel and talent acquisition channels
